title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Reset EQ
scenario: Custom EQ preset values are not cleared after Reset EQ button is used in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected Poly device name to open Device Settings.
Adjust some EQ sliders (e.g., move Bass slider up to +6 dB and Treble slider down to -4 dB).
Tap 'Save' or 'Save Preset' and name the preset (e.g., 'My Custom EQ').
Verify the custom preset appears in the preset list.
Observe the EQ slider positions after reset.
expected: All EQ sliders return to the default (middle/0 dB) positions. The previously saved custom preset ('My Custom EQ') is removed from the preset list.
